one_liner: NVDA -1.39% on 0.84x volume — Broadcom guidance miss creates sector headwinds but NVDA holds better than peers; DCF $333.9 (41.7% MoS) and AI GPU monopoly support a hold.

price_action.vol_rank: Below avg 0.84x — institutional sellers not urgent
price_action.intraday_story: NVDA declined modestly on 0.84x below-average volume while MU and INTC fell 5%+. The relative resilience reflects NVDA's differentiated GPU monopoly position vs commodity memory suppliers. Consolidating $189-201.

valuation.summary: DCF base $333.9 vs $194.83 = 41.7% MoS. Bear DCF $192 is just below current price, limiting further downside. Best-positioned chip name fundamentally.
